title: Boulter and Venus Williams Team Up in Madrid
summary: Katie Boulter from Britain played tennis with Venus Williams in Madrid. Venus Williams is a very famous tennis player who has won many big tournaments. They played together for the first time and won their first match. They beat a team from China. Now they will play against a team from Taiwan and the USA. Katie was nervous before the match, but Venus helped her feel calm. They had fun and smiled while playing. Venus is older than Katie, but they played well together. Katie is getting married later this year, and Venus gave her advice about enjoying the wedding. In another match, a top player named Iga Swiatek had to stop playing because she was sick.

background_read: Tennis is a sport where players hit a ball over a net. Doubles means two players on each team. The Madrid Open is a big tennis tournament in Spain. Venus Williams is one of the greatest tennis players ever. She has won many championships.
Article_Structure: WHO: Katie Boulter and Venus Williams played doubles tennis.
WHAT: They won their first match together in Madrid.
WHERE: At the Madrid Open in Spain.
WHY: They wanted to have fun and play well together.

perspectives.description: She was excited and nervous to play with Venus Williams.
She enjoyed playing with Katie and gave her advice.
